200# return «

User rating: item not rated yet

Fighter type: Mage

Introduced in: Special offer

 

Write a review Send to Discord

Rate this item


description 2/6

Once in a while, summons snakes with one of the following effects: - Reduce the armor of all enemies by 20% for 5 sec. - Deal 70000 damage to all enemies over 3 sec. - Reduce the attack speed of all enemies by 20% for 5 sec. - Prevent the enemies from using any resurrection abilities for 0,5 sec.

description 4/6

Once in a while, summons snakes with one of the following effects: - Reduce the armor of all enemies by 50% for 5 sec. - Deal 100000 damage to all enemies over 3 sec. - Reduce the attack speed of all enemies by 45% for 5 sec. - Prevent the enemies from using any resurrection abilities for 1,5 sec. When an ally dies, summons snake out of turn.

description 6/6

Once in a while, summons snakes that have all of the following effects at once : - Reduce the armor of all enemies by 75% for 5 sec. - Deal 130000 damage to all enemies over 3 sec. - Reduce the attack speed of all enemies by 65% for 5 sec. - Prevent the enemies from using any resurrection abilities for 2,5 sec. When an ally dies, summons snake out of turn. Allows you to speak in the snake language.


Substance of Chaos

description 2/6

Snakes deal additional magic equal to 5% of the target’s max health.

description 4/6

Snakes deal additional magic equal to 5% of the target’s max health. When a snake dies, it deals 100000 physical damage in a small radius around itself.

description 6/6

Snakes deal additional magic equal to 5% of the target’s max health. When a snake dies, it deals 100000 physical damage in a small radius around itself. Snakes deal 130000 magic damage to all enemies in a small radius around them every second.


Substance of Greatness

description 2/6

When a snake reduces the armor of the enemy, the armor of allies is increased by 10% for 3 sec.

description 4/6

When a snake reduces the armor of the enemy, the armor of allies is increased by 10% for 3 sec. When the Snake Charmer summons a snake on ally death, they have a 10% chance to resurrect a random ally with 30% health.

description 6/6

When a snake reduces the armor of the enemy, the armor of allies is increased by 10% for 3 sec. When the Snake Charmer summons a snake on ally death, they have a 10% chance to resurrect a random ally with 30% health. Once in a while, when summoning snakes, all allies gain a shield that absorbs 5 damage. The shield absorbs damage of any type and lasts for 5 sec.


Substance of Harmony

description 2/6

In addition to reducing attack speed, snakes also reduce the enemies’ crit by 30% for 3 sec.

description 4/6

In addition to reducing attack speed, snakes also reduce the enemies’ crit by 30% for 3 sec. In addition to reducing the attack speed, snakes reduce the enemies’ damage by 25% for 5 sec.

description 6/6

In addition to reducing attack speed, snakes also reduce the enemies’ crit by 30% for 3 sec. In addition to reducing the attack speed, snakes reduce the enemies’ damage by 25% for 5 sec. Summoning snakes increases the Snake Charmer’s spell power by 5% for 4 sec. Up to 10 effects.

Materials

Mutagen Potion
Ectoplasm

purchase in:
Gem Bay chest
Deadly Poison

purchase in:
Portal chest for dark souls
Heavenly Steel

purchase in:
Arena battle
Manticore Stinger

purchase in:
